<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements; use Spatie\Html\BaseElement; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Disabled; /** * @method static labelIf(bool $condition, string|null $label) * @method static labelIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $label) * @method static labelUnless(bool $condition, string|null $label) */ class Optgroup extends BaseElement { use Disabled; protected $tag = 'optgroup'; /** * @param string|null $label * * @return static */ public function label($label) { return $this->attribute('label', $label); } }
